standings._comment: CustomCurrent — /standings wraps team records under records[0].teamRecords (array-index path); framework rec_path is dict-key only, so we drill manually in tick().

hitting._comment: CustomCurrent — reads MLBAllTeam.inc_dict, filters AL East, T5 drills 5 hitting endpoints concurrently.

pitching._comment: CustomCurrent — same shape as hitting but group=pitching.

_notes: This watershed.json is the CLI-equivalent declarative form of mlb_pulse.py.
The Python script (mlb_pulse.py) demonstrates the same diamond plus a pre-flight architect() probe and post-run architect.tune() feedback — features that aren't expressible in declarative JSON.
Companion to Tutorial 11 (examples/11-tideweaver/) — see arb_scanner.py + watershed.json for the canonical diamond reference.
